subcodes.first_line: The Preserved Tablet speaketh, the verses are revealed, the perspicuous signs have appeared, the Sun of the Cause shineth resplendent from the horizon of power
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح محفوظ میفرماید آیات نازل و بینات ظاهر و نیر امر از افق اقتدار مشرق و ندا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement
